title: drimia minor
intro: Drimia minor, also known as the Squill or Red-hot Poker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of calcium oxalate crystals, which have been used to treat conditions such as rheumatism, arthritis, and gout, due to their anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The health benefits of Drimia minor include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Drimia minor can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used both internally and externally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
